damage.notes: Damages all units passing through hexes
Damages first unit passing through each hex

name: Haste
effect: Increases the speed of the selected/all friendly unit(s) by 3/5.

name: Disrupting Ray
effect: Reduces the defense of the selected unit by 3/4/5.

name: Fortune
effect: Increases the luck of the selected/all friendly unit(s) by 1/2.

name: Precision
effect: Increases the ranged attack of the selected/all friendly unit(s) by 3/6.

name: Protection from Air
effect: Reduces the damage received from Air Spells by the selected/all friendly unit(s) by 50%/75% 30%/50% .

name: Air Shield
effect: Reduces the damage received from ranged attacks by the selected/all friendly unit(s) by 25%/50%.

name: Hypnotize
effect: Target enemy troop of less than (10/20/50 + (power × 25)) health is put under your control.

name: Counterstrike
effect: Target/All allied troop(s) can retaliate against 1/2 additional attacks per round.

name: Magic Mirror
effect: Target allied troop has a 20%/30%40% chance of being reflecting enemy spells to a random enemy troop.

name: Summon Air Elemental
effect: Summons a troop of (power × 2/3/4) Air Elementals.

name: Shield
effect: Reduces the damage received from hand-to-hand attacks by the selected/all friendly unit(s) by 15%/30%.

name: Slow
effect: Reduces the speed of the selected/all enemy unit(s) by 75%/(50% + 1) 75%/50% .

name: Stone Skin
effect: Increases the defense of the selected/all friendly unit(s) by 3/6.

name: Quicksand
effect: Quicksand pits are placed in 4/6/8 random hexes.

name: Animate Dead
effect: Reanimates (30/60/160 + (power × 50)) HP of killed friendly undead creatures permanently.

name: Anti-Magic
effect: Target, allied troop becomes immune to spells with max level 3/4/5.

name: Earthquake
effect: Does one point of damage to 2/3/4 random castle walls during siege combat.

name: Force Field
effect: A 2/3-hex wide force wall is created at target hex. Movement through these hexes is blocked.

name: Protection from Earth
effect: Reduces the damage received from Earth Spells by the selected/all friendly unit(s) by 50%/75% 30%/50% .

name: Resurrection
effect: Reanimates (40/80/160 + (power × 50)) HP of killed friendly living creatures for the current battle/permanently.

name: Sorrow
effect: Reduces the morale of the selected/all enemy unit(s) by 1/2.

name: Summon Earth Elemental
effect: Summons a troop of (power × 2/2.5/3 2/3/4 ) Earth Elementals.

name: Bloodlust
effect: Increases the attack strength for hand-to-hand attacks of the selected/all friendly unit(s) by 3/6.

name: Curse
effect: Causes the selected/all enemy unit(s) to inflict minimum damage/(minimum damage - 1) when attacking.

name: Protection from Fire
effect: Reduces the damage received from Fire Spells by the selected/all friendly unit(s) by 50%/75% 30%/50% .

name: Blind
effect: Selected enemy unit cannot act until attacked, dispelled or effect wears off. Retaliates at 50%/25%/0% strength.

name: Misfortune
effect: Reduces the luck of the selected/all enemy unit(s) by 1/2.

name: Berserk
effect: Target attacks nearest troop. All creatures in a 1/2/3 hex radius affected.

name: Fire Shield
effect: 20%/25%/30% of hand-to-hand damage inflicted on target, allied troop is counter-inflicted on attackers of the troop.

name: Frenzy
effect: Friendly troop's attack is increased by 100%/150%/200% of its defense and its defense is reduced to 0.

name: Slayer
effect: Target allied troop's attack is increased by 8 against (Bsc) behemoths, dragons, ; and hydras, firebirds, sea serpents, and couatls /(Adv) devils and angels/(Exp) giants and dreadnoughts .

name: Sacrifice
effect: Target, non-undead friendly troop is sacrificed.; Reanimates (power + sac'd troop's base HP + 3/6/10) × # sac'd) HP of non-undead friendly creatures permanently.

name: Summon Fire Elemental
effect: Summons a troop of (power × 2/2.5/3 2/3/4 ) Fire Elementals Fire Elementals.

name: Bless
effect: Causes the selected/all friendly unit(s) to inflict maximum damage/(maximum damage + 1) when attacking.

name: Cure
effect: Removes all negative spell effects from the selected/all friendly unit(s) and heals for (10/20/30 + (power x 5)) HP

name: Dispel
effect: Removes all spell effects from the (Bsc) selected friendly/(Adv) selected enemy/(Exp) all unit(s).

name: Protection from Water
effect: Reduces the damage received from Water Spells by the selected/all friendly unit(s) by 50%/75% 30%/50% .

name: Remove Obstacle
effect: Removes a (Bsc) non-magic obstacle/(Adv) Fire Wall/(Exp) magical obstacle from the battlefield.; Integrated obstacles (such as cliffs) are not affected.

name: Weakness
effect: Reduces the attack of the selected/all enemy unit(s) by 3/6.

name: Forgetfulness
effect: Targets a selected/all enemy ranged troop(s).; (Bsc) Half/(Adv) All the creatures cannot shoot. Half the creatures cannot melee attack.

name: Mirth
effect: Increases the morale of the selected/all friendly unit(s) by 1/2.

name: Teleport
effect: Target allied troop instantly moves to an unoccupied target hex.; (Bsc) Except over walls or moats. (Adv) Except over moats. (Exp) No restrictions.

name: Clone
effect: Creates a duplicate of target, friendly troop with max level 5/6/7. The duplicate is dispelled if it receives any damage.

name: Prayer
effect: Increases the attack, defense, and speed of the selected/all friendly unit(s) by 2/4.

name: Summon Water Elemental
effect: Summons a troop of (power × 2/3/4) Water Elementals.

name: Visions
effect: (Bas) Increases information shown in scouting reports about wandering creatures. Range = SP; (Adv) Additionally reveals the information about enemy heroes. Range is increased to SP×2; (Exp) Additionally reveals the information about enemy towns. Range is increased to SP×3

name: View Air
effect: (Bas) Displays the location of all artifacts on the view world screen.; (Adv) Displays the location of all artifacts and heroes on the view world screen.; (Exp) Displays the location of all artifacts, heroes, and towns on the view world screen.

name: Disguise
effect: (Bas) Shows to enemies all the units in the caster's army as the most powerful unit.; (Adv) Hides the numbers of creatures in each stack.; (Exp) Shows all the units in the caster's army as the most powerful unit affiliated to the starting town.

name: Dimension Door
effect: Teleports hero to a selected location on the adventure map.; The spell may be cast 1/2/3/4 times per day.; Reduces the hero's movement by 300 (bas)/200 (exp) movement points.

name: Fly
effect: Allows the hero to move over water/obstacles with 40%/20%/0% penalty.

name: View Earth
effect: (Bas) Displays the location of all resources on the view world screen.; (Adv) Displays the location of all resources and mines on the view world screen.; (Exp) Displays the location of all resources, mines and terrain on the view world screen.

name: Town Portal
effect: Hero is teleported to the nearest (bas) or any (adv) allied unoccupied town.; Reduces the hero's movement by 300 (bas)/200 (exp) movement points.

name: Summon Boat
effect: 50%/75%/100% chance to summon the closest unoccupied boat to the hero's location.; Can summon player/neutral owned (bas) or enemy's (adv) boats.; (Adv) Creates a boat if no eligible boats exist.

name: Scuttle Boat
effect: 50%/75%/100% chance to destroy an unoccupied boat in the visibility zone.

name: Water Walk
effect: Allows the hero to move over water with 40%/20%/0% movement cost penalty.
